parityMeta.describes: SmartReplacement parity — the pain-history path: a completed training session carrying a painFlag set on pull-up (collectHistoryPainPatterns derives a substitute-action PainPattern) plus a too_heavy loadFeedback on the current lat-pulldown. The pull-up candidate is penalised + warned, and the too_heavy feedback reshapes scoring. Pins the history-derived pain + load-feedback branches.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: Synthetic SmartReplacementParams over the vertical-pull equivalence chain. trainingHistory carries one normal-flagged completed session: a painFlag set on pull-up (severity 4 → severe substitute pattern) and a too_heavy loadFeedback on lat-pulldown. Dates are static strings consumed verbatim (no Date.now), so the golden is byte-stable; generatedAtPolicy 'none'.
